theme_and_archetype.vibe: Calm, professional, trustworthy, modern, minimal. Focus on 'Digital Peace of Mind'.

headings.style: Clean, authoritative, tracking-tight for larger sizes

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#1D3557]

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-24 for section padding.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento-style grids for features/services. Wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12).
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Rounded corners (rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl) for cards to soften the corporate feel.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows (shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]) rather than harsh outlines, creating a premium floating effect.

components_strategy.buttons: Rounded-full (pill shape) for primary CTAs using #D90429. Hover state: slightly darker red or transform -translate-y-1 with shadow.
components_strategy.cards: Surface background #F5F5F5 or White with soft shadow. Minimalist internal padding (p-8).
components_strategy.icons: lucide-react, styled with primary red or dark navy.
components_strategy.wave_shapes: Implement organic SVG ribbons and layered curves using standard HTML/SVG or CSS. Positioned at bottom of Hero or as section dividers. Must use #D90429 or variants with opacity layering.
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky nav (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80). Visible desktop links, CTA button on right.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle lifts (-translate-y-1) and shadow expansions on cards.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Framer motion for staggered fade-up entrances on scroll.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Icon scaling on card hover, button background slides.

sections_breakdown.name: Navigation
sections_breakdown.details: Sticky header, Nivara Ltd logo (text or simple SVG), links (About, Services, Why Us, Testimonials), 'Book Consultation' CTA.

sections_breakdown.name: Hero
sections_breakdown.details: Headline: 'Digital Peace of Mind'. Subheadline: IT consulting for modern business. Dual CTAs: 'Book Consultation' (Red Pill) and 'Get IT Support' (Outline). Background: White/Light grey with abstract smooth red wave/curve SVG shapes placed at the bottom or corners to replicate business card. Image: Professional IT team overlapping the wave.

sections_breakdown.name: About
sections_breakdown.details: Introduction to Nivara Ltd. Clean text layout. High-contrast headings. Image of professionals.

sections_breakdown.name: Services
sections_breakdown.details: 6 cards grid. (IT Consulting, Managed IT Support, Cloud Solutions, Cyber Security, Remote Assistance, Backup & Recovery). Clean lucide-react icons, minimal text.

sections_breakdown.name: Why Choose Us
sections_breakdown.details: Stats or horizontal cards focusing on Reliability, Fast Response, Secure Systems.

sections_breakdown.name: Testimonials
sections_breakdown.details: Grid or simple carousel of client reviews. Soft grey cards with quote icons.

sections_breakdown.name: Contact
sections_breakdown.details: Modern contact form on one side, Contact details (Phone: 074 8050 6197, Email: nivaraltd.dpm@outlook.com) on the other. Clean inputs using Shadcn.

sections_breakdown.name: Footer
sections_breakdown.details: Dark background (#1D3557). Red accents. Logo, links, copyright.

images.description: Three colleagues collaborating around a laptop in an office.
Close up of a rack of computer equipment
Four professionals in business attire stand together.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS strictly. Implement smooth scrolling if possible (e.g., lenis).

Use SVG for the 'red wave/curve shapes' in the Hero background and section dividers to ensure crisp resolution. Use #D90429 for the wave fill. Create an organic, flowing ribbon effect at the bottom of the hero section.
Prioritize a clean white and light grey (#F5F5F5) background throughout the site, using dark navy (#1D3557) for headings to create an authoritative tone.
Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust testing.
Ensure headings use Poppins (google fonts) and body text uses Inter (google fonts). Set up typography via Tailwind config or global CSS imports. Do not use generic fonts.
Do not build a complex backend; this is a pure UI/UX landing page.
Ensure all Shadcn UI components (if used for contact forms, etc.) are styled with the brand colors and soft border radii. Avoid default Vercel-like appearance.
